entities.name: v2.2 Modular
entities.context: Default export format producing 6 separate markdown files for navigation, resumption, design, implementation, validation, and context

entities.name: v2.0 Single File
entities.context: Legacy export format producing one comprehensive markdown file, available via --format single flag

entities.name: Interactive Mode
entities.context: Generation mode that prompts user with questions to build AAR

entities.name: Smart Extraction Mode
entities.context: Non-interactive generation mode that auto-extracts from artifacts and patterns

entities.name: INDEX.md
entities.context: Navigation hub and file directory component of modular export

entities.name: RESUME.md
entities.context: Quick 10-minute resume entry point component of modular export

entities.name: DESIGN.md
entities.context: Key decisions and rationale component of modular export

entities.name: IMPLEMENTATION.md
entities.context: Technical details and code patterns component of modular export

entities.name: VALIDATION.md
entities.context: Testing status and troubleshooting component of modular export

entities.name: CONTEXT.md
entities.context: Thread lineage and metadata component of modular export

relationships.context: v2.2 Modular is the successor format, v2.0 Single File maintained for backward compatibility
INDEX.md is a component file of the modular format
RESUME.md is a component file of the modular format
